site.title: Sehlopha sa Mosebetsi sa Machaba sa ho Finyella
site.tagline: Ho tloha tlhokahalong ea ho fihlella ho li-repo tsa sechaba
nav.label: Ea mantlha
hero.home.eyebrow: Ho Fumaneha ha Mohloli o Bulehileng
meta.home.description: IATF e fetola litlhoko tsa sebele tsa phihlello hore e be libaka tsa polokelo tsa mohloli o bulehileng.
meta.projects.description: Batla merero ea ho fihlella sechaba e phatlalalitsoeng ka IATF.
meta.propose.description: Kopa projeke ea phihlello ho IATF ka marang-rang, ka imeile, kapa ka Discord.
meta.governance.description: Bala kamoo IATF e amohelang merero, e laolang libaka tsa polokelo, le ho boloka mosebetsi o tsebahala.
meta.join.description: Litsela tsa ho nka karolo ho IATF: kenya letsoho khoutu, fetolela, teko, kapa ho boloka morero.
meta.accessibility.description: IATF e ikemiselitse ho boloka sebaka sena sa marang-rang se fumaneha joang le hore na e tlaleha tšitiso ea phihlello joang.
meta.transparency.description: Litlaleho tsa sechaba tsa IATF: liqeto, merero le lintlafatso li bolokiloe li butsoe ka boiketsetso.
actions.emailProjects: Romella diprojeke ka imeile ho inbox
registry.empty.title: Ha ho merero e phatlalalitsoeng hajoale
registry.empty.body: IATF e lokisetsa sehlopha sa eona sa pele sa merero ea sechaba.
proposal.form.title: Romela kopo
proposal.form.body: Tlatsa foromo e ka tlaase mona ho romela kōpo ho IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: Ho hlokahala JavaScript ho sebelisa foromo ena ea marang-rang. Haeba e sa fumanehe, sebelisa imeile kapa Discord ho e-na le hoo.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Ho romela melaetsa ka nako ea sebele ha hoa hlophisoa tikolohong ena. Foromo ena e tla bula lengolo-tsoibila la hao ho e-na le hoo.
proposal.form.ready: Ha u romela kōpo, IATF e tla etsa tlaleho ea ho amohela.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Ka kopo tlatsa tlhahlobo ea ts'ireletso ea spam pele u romella.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Ts'ireletso ea spam e felile. Ka kopo tlatsa tlhahlobo hape pele u romella.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Tšireletso ea spam ha e khone ho netefatsoa hona joale. Ka kopo leka hape.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Nako ea tšireletso ea spam e felile. Ka kopo leka ho hlahloba hape.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Ka kōpo tlatsa masimo a hlokahalang pele u a romela.
proposal.form.success: Kopo ea hao e amohetsoe 'me e bolokiloe bakeng sa ho hlahlojoa.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Haeba u ikopanya le IATF hape mabapi le kopo ena, kenyelletsa litšupiso tse ka tlase.
proposal.form.successLinkLabel: Rekoto e bulehileng ea ho nka
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Ho bile le phoso ha o ne o romela kopo. Ka kopo leka hape. Haeba bothata bo ntse bo tsoela pele, sebelisa imeile ho e-na le hoo.
project.detail.eyebrow: Ho kena ha morero oa sechaba
project.detail.problemTitle: Morero ona o rarolla bothata bofe
project.detail.whyTitle: Lebaka leo morero ona o leng teng ka lona
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Mohloli oa Senyesemane se tloaelehileng, liphetolelo li ka eketsoa hamorao
footer.label: Karolo e ka tlaase ea sebaka sa marang-rang
footer.howToContribute: Kamoo u ka kenyang letsoho kateng
footer.blurb: Mosebetsi oa phihlello o lokela ho ba bonolo ho qala, ho bonolo ho o phatlalatsa le ho lula o bulehile.
footer.source: Tlhaloso ea litekanyetso tsa ho fihlella: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Tloaelo e thehiloeng ho basebelisi ba theknoloji e thusang.
contact.label: Mohokahanyi
translation.label: Boemo ba phetolelo
translation.source: Senyesemane ke puo ea motheo ea leqephe lena.
translation.humanReviewed: Phetolelo ena e 'nile ea hlahlojoa ke sebui se phollatsi.
translation.machineAssisted: Phetolelo ena e thusoa ke mochine 'me ha e e-s'o hlahlojoe ka ho feletseng ke sebui se phollatsi. Litlhahiso li amoheleha ka GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Phetolelo ena e ile ea hlahlojoa pele ho ntlafatso ea morao-rao ea mohloli oa Senyesemane 'me ho ka' na ha hlokahala hore e ntlafatsoe.
translation.report: Tlaleha bothata ba phetolelo: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Ha ke tsebe .
